principles.principle: Dark background (#000000) for all content images
principles.description: Pure black creates high contrast, premium feel. 8/10 Veris samples use #000000.

principles.principle: 4:5 vertical format (1024x1280) as primary, 1:1 as secondary
principles.description: 70% of Veris samples use 4:5. Better for IG portrait/story. More space for text.
Consistent across all Veris samples. CTA in bordered box at bottom.

principles.principle: No vibrant colors. Subtle accents only: blue #202040, red #200000, gray #606080
principles.description: Veris avoids overwhelming colors. Focus on content over decoration.

principles.principle: White text on black background. Clean modern sans-serif. Readable at 320px mobile width
principles.description: Maximum readability. Bold for hooks, regular for body.
Veris optimizes for IG conversion. TikTok is volume play, not primary.

principles.principle: Minimalist premium aesthetic. No emoji in images. No complex patterns/gradients.
principles.description: Clean backgrounds, text as primary visual element.

principles.principle: Direct, premium tone. No fluff. Every word must earn its place.
principles.description: Veris copy is concise, authoritative, action-oriented.
